meaning: adv.同样地,被看作,象 prep.当做 conj.与...一样,当...之时,象,因为 [域] American Samoa,东萨摩亚 [军] Air to Surface,空对地 (As)symb [化]砷 (arsenic)
examples: You're as tall as your father.
I felt as pleased as anything.

The administrators said they hope to sell most of the business as a going concern.
The company will close 53 stores that trade as Threshers, Victoria Wine, Haddows and Bottoms Up.
